programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is deputized to transport a suspected killer of a man and his wife to the county seat along with witnesses who want to lynch the prisoner

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike attempts a risky rescue of a young criminal trapped in a storm drain

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike is retained by a small Latin American country to train a cadre of underwater demolition experts Mike and his team spring into action when the countrys president is kidnapped

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Savages elite squadron is picked for a dangerous top secret bomb run but his men start to crack waiting for fog to lift over the English Channel while they are confined to base One of his best pilots Lt Lockridge is recovering from hepatitis waiting to complete his 25th mission which will get him sent back to the US Gen Savage the medical officer and the nurse who loves Lockridge debate is Lockridge malingering pretending to be A-OK or is he too ill to fly on the mission in which 13 are expected not to come back from

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period A storm causes Barnabas to worry about his bride to be Victoria with her knowledge of history tells him not to worry

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period Angelique meets Jeremiah and discovers that Barnabas was fond of toy soldiers Victoria tries to make friends with her

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 Time period Angelique chokes Barnabas while he kisses Josette by tying a scarf around one of his toy soldiers

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A married couple is trying to enjoy their anniversary However the husband is sure his wife is cheating on him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: When an abusive agent learns that his sexy model of a girlfriend is cheating on him with a photographer he kills him and later kidnaps his girlfriend but soon learns the love is more powerful in death

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A reporter trails a violent cult of devil worshipers calling people back from the dead

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Latin American dictator is exiled to the island and he immediately declares himself dictator of the island with Gilligan as his puppet leader in training

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate pointedly tells Luke that he is welcome to go fishing with Grandpa and Mac Maginnis and to do whatever he wishes for several nights thereafter but Grandpa steps in to make amends when he realizes that Lukes freedom is causing a genuine strain on their still-young marriage

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is listed as dead so he can complete a mission

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Inept Max poses as a safe cracker so the Chief orders all federal bank vaults left open

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Hogans 319
programme.desc: Hogans 319

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While mixing business with pleasure on an island plantation Parker must pose as a Frenchman in order to avoid capture while he reports details on a Japanese radio-jamming operation

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A mix-up with a dictating machine brings a big but poorly-timed Mothers Day surprise for Parker Gruber and Tinker

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Hercules 216
programme.desc: Hercules 216

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone and Marquette must find James Pike a mysterious escaped serial killer who rose from the dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Debi is caught up in a fight simulation developed by the aliens to study human creativity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: While exploring a cavern in an asteroid the Alphans release Balor a sadistic alien who has achieved immortality

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne tries to help a young man with a younger sister and brother and a troubled history Sadly Cheyenne who is looking for his friend finds proof that the young man committed a serious crime involving Cheyennes missing friend

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Four men plan to heist radioactive gold over a poker game Then find out that it is mixed with UraniumThe man smelting and forming the planchets gets radiation poisoning and it goes down hill for them fast

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis one of the countrys richest financier

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While fleeing the police through a forest Dr Kimble finds an armed criminal with a bullet wound The criminal guides him to a cabin owned by a woman who is suspicious of their stories

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While travelling cross country Victoria and Heath have an accident resulting in Heath becoming pinned under their heavily loaded wagon Victoria seeks help and turns to a mysterious man who is being pursued by aggressive bounty hunters

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne interrupts a stagecoach attack but when it crashes he is left to take care of the lone survivor - a baby Cheyenne learns that a land grabber murdered to get his claim then Cheyenne must protect the dead mans heir - the baby

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Episode 1–Mob Candy

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
